author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 5 scoped to MVP: ResNet (18/34/50), MNIST dataset, CIFAR-10 dataset, core image transforms (Resize, CenterCrop, Normalize, ToTensor), model registry, feature extractor. Full model zoo (VGG, ViT, EfficientNet, etc.) deferred — ResNet proves the architecture and the rest follow the same pattern.
